title: NxDoomsSMP
description: NxDoomsSMP adds custom maces with unique combat abilities to your SMP server.
body:
## **NxDoomsSMP**

NxDoomsSMP is a custom SMP plugin designed for **Paper / Spigot 1.21+** that introduces powerful **custom maces** with unique area-based combat abilities. The plugin is lightweight, optimized, and requires no dependencies, making it perfect for survival and PvP servers.

---

## 📦 Plugin Information  
**Name:** NxDoomsSMP  
**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Developer:** NotRenzo  
**Support Server:** [Join Discord](https://dc.gg/nxdevelopment)  
**Minecraft Version:** 1.21+  
**API:** Spigot / Paper  

---
## 🔨 Custom Maces

### 🔥 Blaze Mace

A fire-based mace designed for aggressive combat.

**Abilities:**

* Grants **Fire Resistance** while holding the mace
* On hit, creates a **circular ring of fire** around the target (Flint & Steel style)

---

### 🟣 Ender Mace

An end-game mace focused on crowd control.

**Abilities:**

* On hit, spawns a **large Dragon Breath circle**
* Applies **Levitation** to all entities inside the area

---

## ⚒️ Features

* Custom crafting recipes
* Custom names and lore
* Area-based abilities
* No configuration required
* No dependencies
* SMP & PvP friendly
* Optimized for performance

---
